description: As a Proposal Manager at Booz Allen Hamilton, prepare a proposal response using the unformatted plain text in 'solicitation_raw.docx' for the Managed Security Operations Center (MSOC) Services solicitation (CIRA-2025-MSOC-0047). Format the document by applying 'Heading 1' style to at least four top-level section headers and 'Heading 2' style to at least six sub-section headers. Create a compliance matrix table with at least 10 data rows mapping FAR clauses from Section B (including FAR 52.212-series) to compliance responses. Include the solicitation number 'CIRA-2025-MSOC-0047' in the document header. Save the final document as 'mssoc_proposal_response.docx' in the Desktop\WordTasks folder.
